summary: Comprehensive testing of TRACEGUARD personal safety app - All authentication flows and main features verified successfully. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All 15 requested features verified working.

minor.issue: Warning about bcrypt version attribute - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Login page - Renders with Google button and email form
Login page - Google Sign-in button shows 'Continue with Google'
Login page - Email input visible with data-testid='login-email'
Login page - Password input visible with data-testid='login-password'
Login page - Submit button visible with data-testid='login-submit'
Login page - Toggle auth mode button visible
Login - Email/password authentication works (testuser@example.com)
Login - Redirects to Home page after successful login
Registration - Form shows Full Name field when toggled
Registration - New user can create account successfully
Registration - Redirects to Home page after registration
Home page - Shows user name after login ('Welcome, Test User')
Home page - Status banner shows 'SAFE' status
Home page - SOS button is visible with data-testid='sos-trigger'
Home page - Voice SOS component visible
Home page - Quick Access widgets visible (Trusted Circle, Trip Monitor, Safe Zones, Test Alert)
Home page - Safety Score widget visible
Trusted Circle page - Loads correctly with 'Add Contact' button
Trip Monitor page - Loads correctly with 'New Trip' button
Find Safety page - Loads with map, compass, and filters (Police/Hospital/Barracks)
Settings page - Loads with profile info (Personal Information, Security, Preferences)
Navigation - Sidebar shows all menu items (Home, Trusted Circle, Trip Monitor, Incidents, Evidence Vault, Safe Zones, Find Safety, Family Safety, Corporate, Subscription, Settings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All authentication flows verified working: 1) Email/password login with testuser@example.com/password, 2) Registration flow creates new users successfully, 3) Google OAuth endpoint exists at /api/auth/google and handles token exchange. All main pages load correctly: Home (with SOS button, Voice SOS, Quick Access widgets, Safety Score), Trusted Circle, Trip Monitor, Find Safety (with map and filters), Settings (with profile info). Backend has 20 comprehensive API tests covering auth, CRUD operations, and protected endpoints.

authentication.registration: Working - creates new users with unique emails
authentication.google_oauth: Endpoint exists at /api/auth/google - handles token exchange
authentication.auth_me: Working - returns user info with valid token

home_page.voice_sos: Component visible with voice commands info
home_page.quick_access: All 4 widgets visible (Trusted Circle, Trip Monitor, Safe Zones, Test Alert)

navigation.sidebar: All 11 menu items visible on right side
navigation.user_info: Shows user name and email at bottom

pages.trip_monitor: Loads with New Trip button and past trips
pages.find_safety: Loads with map, compass, and filters
pages.settings: Loads with Personal Information, Security, Preferences sections
